session.user:
Run the following command and report the results: uv run ruff format src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py
Then run: uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py
Report the results.
session.assistant: I'll run both ruff format commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check if reconcile_pipeline.py is formatted with ruff

session.assistant:
ruff passed: File reformatted successfully. The first command reformatted 1 file, and the check command confirms the file is now properly formatted.
**Summary:** - `uv run ruff format src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py`: 1 file reformatted - `uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py`: 1 file already formatted (check passed)
The file `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py` has been formatted to comply with ruff's code style standards.
